title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of improving urban mobility and reducing traffic congestion, then decide which two would be most effective.
options: Expanding and subsidising public transport networks
Introducing congestion charges for city centres
Promoting carpooling and shared mobility apps
Restricting private car access to city centres

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to urban mobility and transport policy. Discuss the following ways of improving urban mobility and reducing traffic congestion, then decide which two would be most effective. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most effective.
